summary: Completed P0 security testing for Development OS - bcrypt password hashing, Socket.IO authentication, and ownership checks

ui_bugs.issue: Frontend registration form shows 'Authentication failed' error
ui_bugs.details: Backend registration API works correctly, but frontend form submission fails

integration_issues.issue: Socket logs show 'No session token, skipping auth' but rooms are still joined
integration_issues.details: Authentication may be working through cookies instead of token header

passed_tests: /auth/me returns user data without password hash
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend registration form submission - backend API works but frontend shows 'Authentication failed' error. Investigate Socket.IO token vs cookie authentication flow.
